rationale: Drive the Some/Some arm through lemma_init_unique to derive hs1@ == hs2@ and then explicitly assert det_real_init_impl_equal(r1, r2) so z3 does not have to chase the closed view trigger. The None/None arm is closed by direct evaluation. A second helper lemma_init_ensures_equal packages the implication so the determinism postcondition is discharged on a single relational fact under the matching-Some-or-None precondition.
